items.caption: A logo design for a company named "crypto trader." the logo features a stylized letter "t" in a teal color, with the word "crypto" written in white above it and "trader" in white below it. the logo is presented in three different color schemes: a teal and white version, a teal and black version, and a teal and green version. the background of the image is a gradient of teal and black, transitioning from a darker shade at the top to a lighter shade at the bottom. the overall style of the image is modern and professional, with a focus on branding and corporate identity.
